name: pi-landstrip
description: Sandbox-aware Pi subagents and interactive command permissions

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist'); for (const file of ['sandbox.json', 'subagents.json']) fs.copyFileSync(file, 'dist/' + file)" && bun build index.ts --outfile dist/index.ts --target=node --packages=external
scripts.fmt: oxfmt *.ts package.json tsconfig.json subagents.json sandbox.json .oxfmtrc.json README.md
scripts.all: npm run fmt && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test
scripts.ci:fmt: oxfmt --check *.ts package.json tsconfig.json subagents.json sandbox.json .oxfmtrc.json README.md
